title: Applied AI Strategist - Market Intelligence (Health)
must_haves: 3+ years experience (product/market research or strategy at startups/funds preferred)
AI-native; uses AI tools naturally for analysis
Systems thinking across products, data, incentives, distribution
Comfortable with incomplete data / decisions under uncertainty
Brutally clear, directly actionable written work
met_strengths: AI-native — builds agents with Claude Code for competitor-intel and growth-experiments (directly matches market-intelligence + AI-tooling brief)
3+ yrs met; startup operator with market-research/GTM exposure
Bias to action under ambiguity (turned ambiguous founder priorities into workstreams)
No SWE required removes the technical-gate risk; UK auth + sponsors visas anyway
hard_blockers_note: No hard blockers (SWE explicitly not required). Soft concerns: health/wearables domain is outside Ryan's crypto/Web3 background; role is a market-intelligence/strategy analyst function (talking to founders/PMs, segmenting markets) rather than the brand/growth/community execution that is his deepest strength.
one_line_verdict: His AI-agent-built competitor-intel work maps unusually well to this strategy role, but it is analyst/strategy in health-data rather than his marketing-execution sweet spot — plausible-to-stretch.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via YC; full description pulled. £40-120k, will sponsor visas. YC W21, team ~25. Apply via workatastartup.com (signup_job_id 93559).
